titleStmt.title: SII 11.179: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 179. (B.K. No. 39 of 1928-29.) ARASIBĪḌI, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A MUTILATED SLAB LYING IN SŪḶĒRAGUḌI TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription is incised on another fragment of the slab containing the inscription published by Dr. Barnett in Epigraphia Indica, Vol. XVII, p. 122. It records the gift of money derived from taxes made by Suṅkaverggaḍe Mantara Barmmaṇa, an officer under Barmmadēvarasa, son of Sindarasa of the Sinda family, described as the lord of the city of Bhōgāvatī, for the feeding of the Ṛishis and the Ajjis (nuns) attached to the Jaina temple called Goṇada Beḍaṅgi Jinālaya of the capital city Vikramapura (modern Arasibīḍi.)

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 10, Krōdhana, Āshāḍha, śu. 1, Wednesday, Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkrānti. The date regularly corresponds to Wednesday, 25th June, A.D. 1085. The lunar month was Nija Āshāḍha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcama
bda mahāsāmantaṁ vīralakṣmīkāntaṁ bhōgāvatīpuravarēśvaraṁ phaṇipatākēśva
ndakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ kadanapracaṇḍa nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīman si
ndarasara magaṁ barmmadēvarasara suṁkaverggaḍe mantara barmmaṇaṁ cāḷukyavikramakālada 10 neya
krōdhanasamvatsarada Āṣāḍha suddha 1 budhavāra dakṣiṇāyaṇasakrāntinimittaṁ rāja
dhāni vikramapurada śrīgoṇadabeḍangijinālayade riṣiya rajjiya rāhāradā
nakke Alliya menneyada suṁkadeluṁ pannāyada suṁkadaluṁ tiṁgaḷige Aydu pa
ṇa ḷekkade varṣaṁprati koṭṭa gadyāṇavāṟuma nāsuṁkama nārorvvar nōrppavar ku
ḍutaṁ barpparī dharmmade paripantanakke nagaramahājana .
Digital edition of SII 11.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
